data.title: Update preplanning/SKILL.md and implementation-plan/SKILL.md Quick Reference tables with flag-gated manual:awaiting_user behavior
data.description:
## What
Add one-line references to the planning.external_dependency_block_enabled flag-gated behavior in the Quick Reference tables of both preplanning/SKILL.md and implementation-plan/SKILL.md.

## Files
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md

## Insertion context — preplanning/SKILL.md
Quick Reference starts at line ~993. Phase table rows: Reconciliation, Risk & Scope Scan, Adversarial Review, Walking Skeleton, Verification. Append to Phase 4 (Verification) row, or add a new row: 'When planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true: reads External Dependencies block, generates manual:awaiting_user stories for user_manual entries, refuses decomposition when block missing. Schema: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md.'

## Insertion context — implementation-plan/SKILL.md
Quick Reference starts at line ~1106. Step table rows: 1 (Contextual Discovery), 2 (Architectural Review), 3 (Atomic Task Drafting), 4 (Plan Review), 5 (Task Creation), 6 (Gap Analysis). Append to Step 1 row or add a note row: 'When planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true: if story is tagged manual:awaiting_user, skill either refuses decomposition (no prep needed) or produces prep-only tasks (prep work exists). Block seeds prep-task context. Manual verification step never appears as a task.'

## Done Definitions
- When complete, preplanning/SKILL.md Quick Reference contains a reference to manual:awaiting_user story generation and plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- When complete, implementation-plan/SKILL.md Quick Reference contains a reference to manual:awaiting_user tag guard behavior
- When complete, check-skill-refs.sh passes on both files

## Testing
testing_mode: GREEN
Structural boundary test: grep plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md and plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md for 'manual:awaiting_user' — must be present in both.

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] Keep entries to 1-2 lines in the table cell; pointer to contract doc is required; full behavior spec lives in the SKILL.md body (added by implementation stories)
- [Maintainability] Tag namespace coexistence: manual:awaiting_user sits alongside design:awaiting_import as a filter tag; document it at the same level of detail
